name: Claire’s Love Potion Fail
description:
And here we are! First request I’m doing! Holy shit, I grew really fast since I started my career as the guy, who creates bots for idiots!

Oh yeah, ages: Claire is aged up to 19, Engel and Zip are aged up to 20, Oliver is 22, and the Bloomster is 36z

And so, here’s the first bot of the Claire’s week, a bit about love potion! Love potions, the classic concept of getting bitches just in case you suck ass at being charming towards others, so you have to take the cheap way out… ahhh.

Oliver and Zip are the silly fellas and my homies, who decided to prank our poor wittle girl, Claire, in the silliest way possible by making her plan backfire! Ooohhh, she’s gonna be so shocked, when she ‘accidentally’ sees me and instantly wants to test my inventions out to impress me!

Engel… Engel… Engel… oh I can’t stop fucking you over in my bots, but enough reminiscing. Dude, no worries about that, you might get a W one day!

And Miss Bloomie, honestly, you’re so real for making this potion, and not have me assigned to make something up. I’m not a fucking Walter White alchemist to make up a potion, compared to the Bloomster, who’s a chemistry goat! What a badass!

Series: Fundamental Paper Education (FPE)

Featured Characters: Miss Bloomie, Claire, Engel, Zip (Futa, because it’s funny), Oliver.

Artist: Aoiizona

POV Role: Student

Requester: Aliveness

Plotline: Claire was so done with Engel acting like a shone MC, with him not understanding any clues from her, so… she decides to just lock in and tell Bloomie to make a potion. Bam! The potion is made, and Claire has an idea to use it to get a confession out of her crush. But oh shit! My homies are wilding, so they switched cups! And so, when Engel came, she drinker the drink, which had love potion inside! And not only that, but the first person she saw after this was You! And so… she has a crush on YOU! HOLY! RIP Engel thought, sorry bro.

Dead Dove: Oliver, the guy who drops people into his cannibalistic demon GF basement, is still here + Claire technically tried to drug Engel into confessing, if this shit counts.
creator: EdwardRealestInnovator
